meta.siteTitle: 李超 | 学术个人主页

title.zh: 副教授、硕士导师、工学博士
title.en: Associate Professor, Master's Supervisor, Ph.D. in Engineering

affiliation.zh: 天津师范大学 信息科学与工程学院
affiliation.en: College of Information Science and Engineering, Tianjin Normal University

bio.zh: 博士，天津师范大学信息科学与工程学院教师。主要从事人工智能、深度学习、脑机接口和情感计算等方向研究，关注智能技术在教育与人机交互场景中的应用。
bio.en: Dr. Yingchao Peng is a faculty member at the College of Information Science and Engineering, Tianjin Normal University. Research interests include artificial intelligence, deep learning, brain-computer interfaces, and affective computing.

summary.zh: 研究方向明确、教学经验扎实，持续关注人工智能与教育技术交叉领域的科研和工程实践。
summary.en: Focused on AI-driven research and engineering practice across educational technology and human-centered intelligent systems.

notice.zh: 欢迎对人工智能、深度学习、脑机接口、情感计算及教育技术应用感兴趣的同学联系交流。
notice.en: Students interested in AI, deep learning, BCI, affective computing, and educational technology are welcome to get in touch.

summary.zh: 围绕神经网络、智能建模与数据驱动方法开展研究，关注算法在教育、认知和工程场景中的应用。
summary.en: Research on neural networks, intelligent modeling, and data-driven methods for educational, cognitive, and engineering applications.

summary.zh: 关注脑电信号分析、认知状态识别和智能交互，为教育与健康场景提供数据支持。
summary.en: EEG signal analysis, cognitive-state recognition, and intelligent interaction for education and health-related scenarios.

summary.zh: 研究学习者情感、注意力和认知负荷等状态的识别与建模，探索智能教育支持方式。
summary.en: Modeling learners' affect, attention, and cognitive load to support intelligent education.

title.zh: 人工智能与脑机接口融合研究进展
title.en: Research Progress on the Integration of Artificial Intelligence and Brain-Computer Interfaces

content.zh: 欢迎对人工智能、深度学习、脑机接口、情感计算、教育数据分析等方向感兴趣的同学联系。建议来信包含个人简历、研究兴趣、已有项目或论文经历。
content.en: Students interested in AI, deep learning, BCI, affective computing, and educational data analysis are welcome to contact me. Please include your CV, research interests, and relevant project or publication experience.
